test-method.name: invalidLoginTest
test-method.description: Verify error message on login with invalid credentials

test-method.name: validLoginTest
test-method.description: Verify successful login with valid credentials

exception.message: Login failed: Still on login-related page expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Login failed: Still on login-related page expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
